figures.caption: Figure 1: Overview of the Text-to-Format task, comparing manual and automated formatting as well as different types of formatting requirements.
Table 1: Performance comparison across models and methods. Metrics include AVG Calls, Accuracy (FA), Hallucination Formatting Rate (HFR), and Average Token Counts (AVG Tokens).

Table 2: Performance of DOCFORMFLOW under different model configurations. FA represents Format Accuracy, HFR represents Hallucination Modification (lower is better). For rows with ↑ / ↓, changes are measured relative to the corresponding Textual Input Only setting.
Table 7: Performance Comparison of Different Model Series and Parameters.
Table 6: List of supported models grouped by series. MM denotes multimodal models; Y/N/S indicate whether reasoning is enabled, disabled, or switchable.
Figure 2: Process of the benchmark construction, including resource collection, document composition, instruction diversification, and distribution balancing.
Table 4: Distribution of Dataset across Different Document Types and Languages.
Table 5: Distribution of Formatting Object Types and Instruction Styles.
Table 3: Supported Formatting Tools and Description.
Figure 3: The architecture of our proposed DOCFORMFLOW.
